---

### About

CTO & Co-founder at **[Roy](https://roy.legal)** a SaaS platform for enterprise legal intelligence, powered by a hierarchical multi-agent architecture. We help corporate legal departments analyze large volumes of complex legal data in record time: contract analysis, M&A due diligence, GDPR compliance, legal drafting, case law research, and regulatory monitoring.

I lead the full technical stack from backend (Kotlin/Ktor) and frontend (React/Next.js) to Kubernetes infrastructure with ArgoCD, and LLM integrations across Anthropic, Google Vertex AI, and OpenAI. My day-to-day sits at the intersection of LLMOps, distributed systems, and product development.

Currently studying at **Epitech**.

---
